calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-14-2012 Set For Trial On May-14-12 At 10:05 A.M. In Dept 624

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-25-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Russell Goodrow,Esq., for Plaintiff/Respondent Sarah Wong, who is also present.
John Choy, Esq., for Respondent/Appellant Edward Chan, who is also present.

This cause comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties, witnesses and interpreter are sworn:

Sarah Wong testifies on her behalf. Interpreter Rebecca Chau assists the plaintiff/respondent. The following exhibits are introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Phone Messages
Exhibit A - Photo of jadeite boat
Exhibit B - Declaration
Exhibit C - Letter by Sarah Huang dated 8/24/11
Exhibit D - Letter written by Sarah Wong

Edward Chan testifies on his behalf. The following exhibit is introduced:
Exhibit E - Exhbit Attachment to the Complaint
Exhibit F - Letter to Edward Chan from Dylan Miles dated 11/23/11
Exhibit G - 5 pages Enasl
Exhibit 2 - Appellant's TRO Request

Kitty Tang, Michael Xinnai Zhao and Jianju Liu testify on behalf of the defendant/appellant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk M. Pena/K. Dougherty, Not Reported (624)
